metadata.name: MIMIC 25bb HU Preflop Baseline
metadata.description: This baseline stores aggregate preflop action frequencies for 25bb heads-up play. It is intended for persona-based AI behavior, not exact solver replication.

SB_FIRST_IN_25BB.description: SB acts first at 25bb effective stack.
SB_FIRST_IN_25BB.summary: SB mostly enters the pot. Limp is slightly more common than raise. Fold exists only for the weakest offsuit hands.

BB_VS_SB_LIMP_25BB.summary: BB checks most often versus limp, but still isolates or jams at meaningful frequency.

BB_VS_SB_OPEN_2BB_25BB.summary: BB defends very wide versus 2bb open. Call is the main response; fold remains below 20%.

SB_VS_BB_JAM_AFTER_OPEN_2BB.description: SB opens to 2bb, BB jams 25bb, SB responds.
SB_VS_BB_JAM_AFTER_OPEN_2BB.summary: SB calls roughly one quarter of the time versus BB jam after opening.

SB_VS_BB_3BET_5_AFTER_OPEN_2BB.description: SB opens to 2bb, BB 3bets to 5bb, SB responds.
SB_VS_BB_3BET_5_AFTER_OPEN_2BB.summary: SB continues fairly wide versus small 3bet. Call is the main continue option.

SB_VS_BB_3BET_7_AFTER_OPEN_2BB.description: SB opens to 2bb, BB 3bets to 7bb, SB responds.
SB_VS_BB_3BET_7_AFTER_OPEN_2BB.summary: SB folds heavily versus large 7bb 3bet, with only strong hands continuing.

SB_VS_BB_3BET_8_AFTER_OPEN_2BB.description: SB opens to 2bb, BB 3bets to 8bb, SB responds.
SB_VS_BB_3BET_8_AFTER_OPEN_2BB.summary: SB still folds most often versus 8bb 3bet, but all-in and call remain meaningful.

SB_VS_BB_ISO_3_AFTER_LIMP.description: SB limps, BB raises to 3bb, SB responds.
SB_VS_BB_ISO_3_AFTER_LIMP.summary: SB versus small iso is almost split between call and fold, with small limp-jam frequency.

SB_VS_BB_ISO_7_5_AFTER_LIMP.description: SB limps, BB raises to 7.5bb, SB responds.
SB_VS_BB_ISO_7_5_AFTER_LIMP.summary: SB continues surprisingly often versus large iso because limp range contains traps and strong continues.

SB_VS_BB_JAM_AFTER_LIMP.description: SB limps, BB jams 25bb, SB responds.
SB_VS_BB_JAM_AFTER_LIMP.summary: SB folds most of limp range versus BB jam but retains trap calls.

BB_VS_SB_LIMP_JAM_AFTER_ISO_3.description: SB limps, BB raises to 3bb, SB jams 25bb, BB responds.
BB_VS_SB_LIMP_JAM_AFTER_ISO_3.summary: BB calls only a minority after small iso and facing limp-jam.

BB_VS_SB_LIMP_JAM_AFTER_ISO_7.description: SB limps, BB raises to 7bb, SB jams 25bb, BB responds.
BB_VS_SB_LIMP_JAM_AFTER_ISO_7.summary: BB calls very often after large iso and facing limp-jam due to pot commitment and stronger iso range.
